gt_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.Admission = '-' AND T2.`T-BIL` < 2.0 AND T2.Date LIKE '1991-10-%'
pred_sql:
SELECT p.ID
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Admission = '-'
  AND l.Date LIKE '1991-10%'
  AND l."T-BIL" < 2.0
question: List all patients who were followed up at the outpatient clinic who underwent a laboratory test in October 1991 and had a total blood bilirubin level within the normal range.
